message:
Fix bugs found in fresh-eyes code review

- error-boundary.tsx: Fix fallback={null} not working as intended
  The check `if (this.props.fallback)` was falsy for null, so passing
  fallback={null} to render nothing on error would show ErrorFallback
  instead. Changed to check `!== undefined`.

- process-transcript.ts: Fix filesEdited and linesWritten always 0
  These stats were declared but never populated. Added logic to extract
  file editing info from Write/Edit tool calls in the transcript.

- process-transcript.ts: Remove unused PROCESSOR_PATH constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
